Table.Name: Command
Table.Command: SELECT T0."AbsEntry" AS "PickListNumber", T0."Name" AS "Picker", T0."PickDate", T1."U_NAME" AS "User", T0."Status", T0."Remarks" FROM "OPKL" T0 JOIN "OUSR" T1 ON T1."INTERNAL_K" = T0."OwnerCode" WHERE T0."AbsEntry" = {?DocKey@}

Table.Name: Command

FormulaFieldDefinitions.FormulaFieldDefinition: switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Pluk liste nr.', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Plukklistenr.', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Kommissionierlistennummer', True, 'Pick List No.' //Default English )
switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Delvist plukket', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Teilweise kommissioniert', True, 'Partially Picked' //Default English )
switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Delvist leveret', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Teilweise geliefert', True, 'Partially Delivered' //Default English )
switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Lev. Dato', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Lev. Dato', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Lief./Fäll.dat', True, 'Del. Date' //Default English )
switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'På lager', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'På lager', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Auf Lager', True, 'Available' //Default English )
switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Stk pr. enhed', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Varer pr. enhet', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Artikel pr. Einheit', True, 'Items per unit' //Default English )

switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Side: '+ ToText(PageNumber,'#') +' af '+Totext(TotalPageCount,'#'), {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Side: '+ ToText(PageNumber,'#') +' av '+Totext(TotalPageCount,'#'), {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Seite: '+ ToText(PageNumber,'#') +' von '+Totext(TotalPageCount,'#'), {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Página: '+ ToText(PageNumber,'#') +' de '+Totext(TotalPageCount,'#'), {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Pagina: '+ ToText(PageNumber,'#') +' van '+Totext(TotalPageCount,'#'), {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Page: '+ ToText(PageNumber,'#') +' de '+Totext(TotalPageCount,'#'), TRUE, 'Page: '+ ToText(PageNumber,'#') +' of '+Totext(TotalPageCount,'#') )
